September 10, 2024

↑ YTD: 4.4% ↓ YTD: -8.8% Sentiment: Positive

Bi-Weekly Report
• Sentiment Improves as Signs of Early Recovery Develop - VLCC owners have made some progress in the first week of
September, buoyed by renewed market optimism and hints of recovery after a prolonged downturn. The AG VLCC market,
which had experienced a sharp drop in rates to yearly lows, is now seeing encouraging signs of a turnaround. Owners
demonstrated strong resistance after a sluggish start to the week, with several market-quoted cargoes receiving fewer
offer
